title: Agend’App
intro: Agend’App is a platform currently under development for beauty and wellness professionals. It aims to centralize the management of their activities such as resource planning, appointment scheduling and leave management.
intro2: The project relies on a web administration interface connected to a mobile application.
contribution: As part of this project developed during my internship, I contributed to the design of the back-end. I was responsible for the "establishments" domain and its related entities, one of the two core areas of the application's data model alongside user management.
contribution2: I also worked independently on the web administration interface used by professionals to manage their activity and data.
